overview:
## Discussion

You create an instance of `PromisesApi` in order to interact with the API. Methods on this class return promises that complete with a response object.

The `defaultOptions` dictionary has the following properties:

items.description: A dictionary of options for promises API classes.
items.name: PromisesApiOptions

items.description: A dictionary of your authorization tokens.
items.name: Security

title: PromisesApi
